description: Resume an interrupted task from .dynos/ state. Use after session restart or context compression.

manifest.json.note: Each manifest is an object; the skill globs for multiple files

resume_directive.description: The command to run next based on the task's current stage (e.g. /dynos-work:plan, /dynos-work:execute, /dynos-work:audit)

task_id.description: The ID of the resumed task

current_stage.description: The stage the task was at when interrupted
